chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1258 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.5890/2024 2. For hearing of main case 23.05.2025 Mr. Zain A. Jatoi, advocate for the petitioner Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate for respondent Mr. Muhammad Saeed Shahzad, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Muhammad Nayyar Shafiq, Collector of Customs, Appraisement Port Muhammad Bin Qasim, Karachi Under instructions learned counsel for the petitioner states that notices impugned herein, available at pages 51 and 53, shall be contested before the issuing authority. Learned counsel seeks that the same be determined after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending the aforesaid no further coercive action be taken there against. Mr. Muhammad Nayyar Shafiq, Collector of Customs, Appraisement Port Muhammad Bin Qasim, Karachi, is present and articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that the petition may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Contempt notice issued is hereby discharged; presence and assistance of officer is appreciated and dispensed with. Judge Judge Amjad
